top_signals.title: Greenland leader says Trump’s aim unchanged after envoy talks
top_signals.summary: Prime Minister Jens-Frederik Nielsen said he used the meeting to reiterate that "the Greenlandic people are not for sale."
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
